character_designs.identity: 19-25-year-old Blackwolf snowline scout and peripheral liaison for the Northern disaster-source-seeking faction

body_and_face.age_lock: Adult 19-25; not a child, not an old veteran, not a romantic noble lead.
body_and_face.species_lock: Medium-low anthropomorphism Blackwolf beastfolk, clearly an upright wolf-bodied subject with wolf muzzle, black wolf ears, long nose bridge, golden vertical pupils, canine teeth, black-grey layered tail, and wolf facial tattooing; never a normal human with costume ears and tail.
body_and_face.gender_lock: Primary asset uses a restrained, non-noble adult scout presentation with no sexualized or strongly gender-coded costume. Future shots may adjust gender detail, but this board locks the same recognizable wolf anatomy, posture, and gear.
body_and_face.build: About 1.82-1.90 m and 68-82 kg; close to a tall human in height but leaner, longer-legged, tighter-waisted, narrow-shouldered, and more explosive.
body_and_face.posture: Low forward stance, ears angled back, tail low for balance, weight ready to drop into a sprint or crouched listening pose.
body_and_face.expression: Alert, suspicious, hesitant to trust, always measuring wind, scent, snow, and exits before speaking.

constant_anchors: black wolf ears with high ear root and backward alert angle
long nose bridge and visible restrained canine teeth
black-grey layered low wolf tail reaching the calf
wolf facial tattooing along muzzle, cheekbone, and nose bridge
black-grey short wolf pelt ending below the shoulder blades
dark-blue fitted snow-runner clothing, tight at waist, sleeve, and trouser cuffs
snow claw footgear that widens the landing area
small bonewood liaison token, rawhide cord, and dark red oath cord as object language only

state_designs.episode_range: 09 and reusable northern snowline patrol shots
state_designs.species_and_body: Lean upright Blackwolf scout with long lower legs, narrow shoulders, tight waist, low tail, clear wolf muzzle, and gold vertical eyes.
state_designs.silhouette: Compact forward-leaning scout silhouette: short wolf pelt above the shoulder blades, fitted dark-blue snow-runner clothing, visible forearm guards, kneepads, short bow, and three short javelins.
state_designs.color_logic: Black-grey fur and dark-blue clothing dominate; silver-white frost defines edges; golden eyes are the only bright identity point.
state_designs.damage_level: Clean wind wear, frost, and rubbed leather only; no ragged savage styling.
required_details: wolf muzzle and gold vertical pupils must be readable
short pelt must not become a heavy cloak
short bow and three short javelins must be present
low forward stance must show snowline scouting speed
no new wolf crest or visible badge

state_designs.episode_range: 09-12 northern contact, warning, and cross-faction liaison shots
state_designs.species_and_body: Same Blackwolf body plan, with muzzle partly shadowed by a dark grey wind wrap while still clearly wolf-bodied.
state_designs.silhouette: Short pelt compressed close to the back, dark wind wrap around neck and lower muzzle, small side packet and bonewood liaison token at waist, bow kept close, tail low and still.
state_designs.color_logic: Dark grey and dark blue suppress the scout; bonewood and dark-silver objects are small readable liaison cues; gold eyes remain visible.
state_designs.damage_level: Snow dust and wind polish; clothing stays complete and precise.
required_details: wind wrap must not erase the wolf muzzle
liaison authority must come from packet, token, cord, and posture, not a new emblem
short pelt and fitted snow clothing remain visible
bone whistle and dark-silver wolf-tooth buckle must remain present
no official banner, crest, or clan badge

state_designs.episode_range: night pursuit, beacon interception, frost-wolf guidance, and short skirmish shots
state_designs.species_and_body: Same lean long-limbed Blackwolf scout in a lower, more explosive crouch; tail compressed low for balance, ears back, claws and footgear exposed.
state_designs.silhouette: Long diagonal sprint-ready silhouette with the short bow angled back, three javelins over shoulder or side, forearm guards forward, kneepads and snow claw footgear dominant.
state_designs.color_logic: Black, grey, and dark blue stay low-saturation; silver-white frost catches the moving edges; golden eyes and old iron tips are small focus points.
state_designs.damage_level: Active frost, snow scuff, and rubbed leather; no blood spectacle, no shredded costume.
required_details: same face, wolf muzzle, gold eyes, and tail must remain continuous
snow claw footgear must clearly widen the landing area
short bow and three javelins must read as scout weapons, not heavy infantry tools
movement must feel like tracking and interception rather than heroic charge
no giant wolf spirit, high magic, or attack aura

detail_panels.purpose: Lock Wu Lan as a medium-low anthropomorphism Blackwolf scout.
detail_panels.notes: Clear wolf muzzle, black wolf ears, long nose bridge, cheekbone, restrained canine teeth, golden vertical pupils, alert and hesitant expression.

detail_panels.purpose: Prevent the design from becoming a human wearing animal accessories.
detail_panels.notes: High-root black ears angled backward, low black-grey layered wolf tail to calf, wolf facial tattooing along muzzle, cheekbone, and nose bridge.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock non-noble scout warmth without losing agility.
detail_panels.notes: Short pelt ends below shoulder blades; light, wind-worn, frost-dusted, never a heavy cloak.
Fitted waist, tied sleeve and trouser cuffs, clean cold-resistant cloth, no modern tactical fabric.

detail_panels.purpose: Show low sprinting and snowline survival.
detail_panels.notes: Wind-worn leather, claw profile visible under gloves, protective knees for crouch and crawl.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock the scouting and liaison equipment.
detail_panels.notes: Bone whistle at chest or waist, compact short bow, exactly three short javelins, old iron tips, rawhide wraps.

detail_panels.purpose: Make the Blackwolf scout plausible on the snowline.
detail_panels.notes: Foot claw snowshoe hybrid widens landing area without becoming modern crampons or sci-fi gear.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry northern object-symbol continuity without a new badge.
detail_panels.notes: Small dark-silver wolf-tooth buckle, bonewood liaison token, rawhide cord, and dark red oath cord are material objects, not a crest.
Black-grey fur, dark-blue thick weave, silver-white frost, wind-worn leather, bone white, old iron, bonewood, dark red oath cord, frozen earth grey, golden eye color.

negative_rules: jade noble ornaments as main focus
